name: Metal and Marble Console Table with Shelf White Carrara Marble/Dark Bronze - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee
description:
Elevate your home’s interiors with this Metal and Marble Console Table with Shelf from Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee. Featuring a dark bronze-finish steel frame, it offers refined contrast against the white Carrara marble tabletop for a beautifully balanced look that suits a wide range of decor styles. Plus, a lower shelf provides additional space to display decorative accents or keep everyday essentials neatly accessible.

Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee: Looks like home, feels like you.
